recommendations.title: Shelby Oaks
recommendations.overview: A woman's obsessive search for her missing sister leads her into a terrifying mystery at the hands of an unknown evil.

recommendations.title: Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A woman's carefully constructed life is upended when an unwelcome shadow from her past returns, forcing her to confront the monster she's evaded for two decades.

recommendations.title: The Summit of the Gods
recommendations.overview: A photojournalist's obsessive quest for the truth about the first expedition to Mt. Everest leads him to search for an esteemed climber who went missing.

recommendations.title: Inadequate People
recommendations.overview: A 30-year-old man, Vitaly, moves to Moscow in search of inner peace after struggling with personal and psychological issues. As he settles into a seemingly ordinary life, he forms an unexpected bond with his younger neighbor, forcing him to confront

recommendations.title: Leave Her to Heaven
recommendations.overview: A socialite marries a prominent novelist, which spurs a violent, obsessive, and dangerous jealousy in her.

recommendations.title: Hunting Season
recommendations.overview: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.

recommendations.title: Kaili Blues
recommendations.overview: Chen Sheng goes off in search of his nephew who has been abandoned by his father. Along the way, he encounters numerous people from his past and also those from his future.

recommendations.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
recommendations.overview: Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Identity
recommendations.overview: Wounded to the brink of death and suffering from amnesia, Jason Bourne is rescued at sea by a fisherman. With nothing to go on but a Swiss bank account number, he starts to reconstruct his life, but finds that many people he encounters want him dead.

recommendations.title: Bangalore Days
recommendations.overview: A fun roller coaster ride about three young people, Aju, Divya and Kuttan who are cousins, reach Bangalore to dream, discover & explore!
